reference: I have many flesh-colored spots on my armpits and a few of the same spots around my nipples and pubic area. I showed my Nurse Practitioner my armpits, and after researching, she diagnosed me with Fox-Fordyce disease. I researched it a little online and realized that the spots around my nipples and pubic area confirm her diagnosis. What type of treatment do you suggest? What are some things that I can do myself at home to help diminish this? For instance, I already use tretinoin cream on my face, and she suggested that I could try that. Should I wash my armpits and then apply the cream at night to wash off my deodorant? Also, is deodorant bad for the condition, or is shaving bad for it as well?
text: I have many flesh-colored spots on my armpits and a few of the same spots around my nipples and pubic area. I showed my nurse practitioner my armpits, and after researching, she diagnosed me with Fox-Fordyce disease. I researched it a little online and realized that the spots around my nipples and pubic area confirm her diagnosis. What type of treatment do you suggest? What are some things that I can do myself at home to help diminish this? For instance, I already use tretinoin cream on my face, and she suggested that I could try that. Should I wash my armpits and then apply the cream at night to wash off my deodorant? Also, is deodorant bad for the condition? Or is shaving bad for it as well?
